name: Comforting Barbecue Sauce
recipeIngredient: None specified in the provided text.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onions, celery, bell pepper, and parsley in peanut oil until onions are clear or tender.
2. Add garlic and cook for a few minutes longer.
3. Stir in steak sauce, hot sauce, and ketchup. Season with salt to taste.
4. Pour in Southern Comfort Liquor.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Lower heat, cover, and simmer for 2 to 3 hours.
7. The sauce can be stored in the refrigerator for several weeks.
(Note: This recipe does not specify any ingredients.)
